ほ、本当に良かったですっ！<br>ヒナギさんのおかげで……ほ、本当にっ！: I-I'm so relieved! Thanks to Hinagi... I really, truly am!
あぁ。正直、あんまり何をされたのか覚えていないんだが、<br>ヒナギには感謝しな:
Yeah. Honestly, I don't really remember what she did, but I've got to
thank Hinagi.
何時間悪夢にうなされていたのか分からない。<br>ただ、目覚めると全身に汗を掻い:
I had no idea how many hours I'd been tormented by that nightmare.
When I came to, Hinagi was clinging to me, drenched in sweat.
しかし、意識を取り戻したヒナギは、何も語らず、<br>着衣の乱れを直してそそくさ:
But once Hinagi regained consciousness, she didn't say a word,
straightened her disheveled clothes, and quickly left the room.
陰陽師の秘術を使ったらしいが、どういうものだったんだろうな。<br>なんとなく想:
I guess she used some Onmyoji secret technique. I wonder what it was
like. I can sort of imagine, but it's a shame I don't remember.
司令室のドアがノックされる。アリシアが開けると、ヒナギの姿が。<br>汚れた紙切:
A knock at the command room door. When Alicia opened it, Hinagi was
standing there, holding a dirty piece of paper, her expression grim.
まさかと思いましたが――<br>司令本部の入り口の土中から、こんなものが……:
I did not think it was possible, but... I found this buried in the ground
at the entrance to Command HQ.
ん？ 紙切れ？ なんだそれは？: Huh? A piece of paper? What's that?
<ruby=かたしろ>形代</>と言って、陰陽師が用いる呪符の１種です……: It is called a curse effigy—a type of cursed talisman used by Onmyoji.
なんでそれが司令本部の入り口に……！？: Why is that at the entrance to Command HQ?!
何者かがこれを仕掛けて、<br>司令官様に呪詛が掛かるように仕向けたのだと思いま: I believe someone placed this here to lay a curse on you, Commander.
俺に呪いを掛けたってことか？ いったい何の目的で……: So someone cursed me? What could their goal be...
はっきりとは判りませんが、<br>おそらく由緒正しき血統をお持ちの司令官様の力を:
I cannot say for sure, but it is likely aimed at taking away your power,
Commander, given your noble bloodline.
とんだモノ好きもいたもんだなぁ。: Some people sure have strange hobbies.
実は先日、私の部屋から呪術書が１冊、盗まれてしまったのです。<br>その呪術書に:
Actually, the other day, a grimoire was stolen from my room. That
book should have contained the instructions for making this talisman—
ふむ。<br>俺が標的なら、また狙ってくるかもしれないな。: Hmm. If I'm the target, they might come after me again.
申し訳ございません。私の管理ミスです。<br>まさか私の結界を破ることができる人:
I sincerely apologize. This was my oversight. I never imagined there
was someone in the Frontline Base who could break my barrier...
気にするな。もともと、色々な奴から狙われている。<br>１人くらい増えても違いは:
Don't worry about it. I've been targeted by all sorts already. One
more doesn't make a difference.
何を言ってるんですか！<br>司令官様の命が奪われでもしたら……わ、私は……: What are you saying! If Commander's life were to be taken... I... I...
ヒナギは感情が昂り、目を潤ませる。<br>その瞳でこちらを見つめられては何も言え:
Hinagi's emotions surged, and her eyes welled up. When she looked at
me with those eyes, I couldn't say a word.
俺も細心の注意を払うよ、ヒナギ。<br>だが、もしまた変な呪いに掛かってしまった:
I'll be extra careful too, Hinagi. But if I get caught in another weird
curse, I'm counting on you.
もちろんです。しかし、事の発端は私の本が奪われたせい。<br>必ずや犯人を突き止:
Of course. But this all began because my grimoire was stolen. I will
find the culprit and remove this threat from you, Lord Commander.
犯人を突き止めるって言っても、いったいどうやって？:
But even if you say you'll find the culprit, how exactly are you going
to do that?
この手の術式を扱う者には独特の邪気が漂うものです。<br>それに触れることができ:
Those who employ such techniques emit a unique malign energy. If we
can trace it...
この時、すでにヒナギの中には犯人捜しをする為のあてが浮かんでいた。<br>そして:
At that moment, Hinagi already had a plan for tracking down the
culprit. And the resolve to throw herself into that danger—
